data.name: Action_Add_String
data.value: Add the reference through the solution explorer

data.name: Action_On_Project_Rename
data.value: Rename project in config file with rules remain?

data.name: Action_Remove_String
data.value: Remove the reference through the solution explorer

data.name: Activation_Fail
data.value: Extension activation fail: During activation there wasn't detected any references between projects

data.name: Claim_Match_Error_Description
data.value: The reference is claimed as the required and unacceptable at the same time

data.name: Commit_Fail
data.value: Reference commit fail: During commit there wasn't detected any references between projects

data.name: Config_File_Load_Error_1
data.value: config file load ended with fail

data.name: Config_File_Load_From_Cache_Fail
data.value: The cache file data load ends with fail

data.name: Config_File_On_Create_From_Sample_Action
data.value: Config file will be recreated with the usage of default sample

data.name: Config_File_On_Create_From_Sample_Question
data.value: Recreate config file by the usage of default file sample?

data.name: Config_File_On_Load_From_Cache_Action
data.value: Config file will be recreated with the latest cache data

data.name: Config_File_On_Load_From_Cache_Question
data.value: Recreate config file by the last saved cache instance?

data.name: Config_File_Property_Null_Error_Action
data.value: Check it on syntax errors and for compliance with the configuration file template

data.name: Config_File_Transfer_To_Rollback_File_Message
data.value: All data from the file will be transferred to rollback-file

data.name: Excecute_Changed_Refs_On_Empty
data.value: There are no any reference changes from the last state commit

data.name: Excecute_Changed_Refs_Start_Message
data.value: Here are following reference changes since the last state commit :

data.name: Excecute_Current_Refs_On_Empty
data.value: There are no any project references in this solution at this moment

data.name: Excecute_Current_Refs_Title
data.value: References between projects at this moment

data.name: Extension_Not_Load_Yet
data.value: The extension isn't load yet. Wait until the load ends to pass the action

data.name: First_Solution_Load_Message_1
data.value: Is it needed to use RefDepGuard on

data.name: First_Solution_Load_Message_2
data.value: solution ?. On click 'YES' the extension will be activated and check projects on config file rules compare

data.name: Framework_Version_Comparability_Error_Action
data.value: Change the project version or modify the config file

data.name: Framework_Version_Comparability_Error_Message
data.value: ', when its max acceptable version is '

data.name: Graph_Type_Export_Fail
data.value: The HTML export ended with fail as the file is occupied by different process. Try again later

data.name: Graph_Type_Export_Success
data.value: The HTML export ended successfully. Open a folder with the generated report?

data.name: Illegal_TFM_Usage_Error_Action
data.value: Check the specified 'max_framework_version' string for compliance with the relevant TFM project

data.name: Illegal_TFM_Usage_Error_Message
data.value: contains an attempt to set a limit for TFM that is not found in the current project

data.name: Incorrect_TFM_Usage_Error_Action
data.value: Correct the parameter value to a valid one

data.name: Incorrect_TFM_Usage_Error_Message
data.value: contains the use of a template for setting multiple restrictions, which is unacceptable for this project (the project has only one type of a specified TFM)

data.name: Invalid_Project_Type_Error
data.value: contains an incorrect entry of its value

data.name: Message_On_Project_Sample_Add_1
data.value: Add an empty project sample into config file for a project '

data.name: One_Proj_Match_Error_Description
data.value: The reference is matches with project name

data.name: On_Zero_Finded_Errors_Table_Report
data.value: There are no any detected errors on export moment

data.name: On_Zero_Finded_Warnings_Table_Report
data.value: There are no any detected warnings on export moment

data.name: Project_Type_Copy_Error
data.value: contains the same type of project in the template more than once

data.name: Reference_Match_Contrad_Warn_Action
data.value: Resolve the contradiction in the rule

data.name: Reference_Match_Error_Action
data.value: Resolve the contradiction in the rule

data.name: Reference_Match_Warn_Contrad_Message
data.value: contradict to a rule with eponymous reference

data.name: Reference_Match_Warn_Duplicate_Message
data.value: duplicate a rule with eponymous reference

data.name: Rollback_File_Generation_Fail_Message
data.value: Check whether there are no read prohibits on .rdg files and root doesn't have prohibit on file creation

data.name: Table_Type_Export_Fail
data.value: The XLSX report ended with fail as the file is occupied by different process. Close all Excel files and try again later

data.name: Table_Type_Export_Success
data.value: The XLSX export successfully ended. Open a folder with the generated report?

data.name: Unable_To_Export_Message
data.value: Unable to start an export as the extension didn't detect any project references in this solution

data.name: Unsuccessful_Checking_Rules_Warning
data.value: warning: It was not possible to verify the compliance of the references with the rules, as they were not detected at the time of state fixation. Make sure that the solution actually contains references between projects and perform a manual or automatic check along with the build

data.name: Unsuccessful_Config_File_Parse_Warning_1
data.value: warning: It was not possible to parse data from the file '

data.name: Unsuccessful_Config_File_Parse_Warning_2
data.value: '. The rules from this file isn't included inside rules check

data.name: Project_Match_Warning_Action
data.value: Check the project on the correct spelling of its name in the configuration file

data.name: Project_Match_Warning_Message
data.value: A considered project is not found in the

data.name: Project_Not_Found_Warning_Action
data.value: Check the rule on the correct spelling in the configuration file

data.name: Project_Not_Found_Warning_Message
data.value: This project is listed in the reference rule , but not found in the solution itself

data.name: Max_Fr_Version_Deviant_Value_Warn_Action
data.value: Adjust the value to the correct format

data.name: Max_Fr_Version_Deviant_Value_Warn_Message
data.value: ', but should contains a value with a dot ('x.x' format).

data.name: Supertype_All_Level
data.value: that is specified in the 'all' supertype at the same level

data.name: Max_Fr_Version_Reference_Conflict_Warn_Message
data.value: leads to a potential version conflict of targetFramework, as there is a reference to a project that has

data.name: Max_Fr_Version_Reference_Conflict_Incomparable_Error_Cause
data.value: incompatible value of the 'framework_max_version' parameter for the current project value of the 'netstandard' type

data.name: Max_Fr_Version_Conflict_Bigger_Value_Error_Cause
data.value: the higher value of the 'framework_max_version' parameter

data.name: TFM_Not_Found_Warn_Action
data.value: Check the specified 'max_framework_version' string for compliance with existing TFMs

data.name: Illegal_Template_Usage_Warn_Action
data.value: Check the specified 'max_framework_version' string for compliance with the relevant TFM solution

data.name: Illegal_Template_Usage_Warn_Message
data.value: In the 'framework_max_version' parameter specifies TFM, which is not found in any of the 'TargetFramework' of this solution projects

data.name: In_The_Proj_Name_String
data.value: in the name of the project '

data.name: Proj_Name_Semantic_Warn_Action
data.value: Fix the typo in the project name

data.name: Untyped_Warn_Message
data.value: It was not possible to check the version of 'TargetFramework' for the considered project, cause the program could not get the correct value for this property from the .csproj file

data.name: Untyped_Warn_Action
data.value: Make sure that the project has the correct version of its 'TargetFramework'

data.name: Transit_Refs_Message
data.value: The following transitive references have been found in this project:

data.name: Transit_Refs_Duplicate_Warn_Message
data.value: The considered project has 1 or more transitive references that duplicate the following direct references of the project:
